stemHtml: Flying a VFR cross-country flight in Western Europe, the pilot has planned a turning point WITHOUT a visual checkpoint. What is the best means of determining that the pilot has reached the turning point?

options.a: A DME distance from a DME across the route.
options.b: VOR radial from a beacon across the route
options.c: Bearing from an NDB ahead of or behind the aircraft.
options.d: A request to the Flight Information Service for a QDR.
